title: Microsoft Exchange Calendar
description: Represents a calendar container for event resources as exposed through the Microsoft Graph Calendar API. Can be a calendar for a user or the default calendar of a Microsoft 365 group. Users can organize calendars in calendar groups.

color.description: Specifies the color theme to distinguish the calendar in the UI

hexColor.description: The calendar color in hex format (e.g. #FF0000)

isDefaultCalendar.description: Whether this is the default calendar for new events

changeKey.description: Identifies the version of the calendar object

canEdit.description: Whether the user can write to the calendar

canShare.description: Whether the user has permission to share the calendar

canViewPrivateItems.description: Whether the user can read private calendar items

isRemovable.description: Whether this calendar can be deleted from the mailbox

isTallyingResponses.description: Whether this calendar supports tracking of meeting responses

owner.description: The user who created or added the calendar

allowedOnlineMeetingProviders.description: Online meeting providers available for this calendar

defaultOnlineMeetingProvider.description: Default online meeting provider for meetings from this calendar

emailAddress.description: The name and email address of a person
